/CAL  DA MTR HRG/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA 05-29-12/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ 47 DAYS/ADDL CTS 47/CTORD COURT PROBATION CONVERTED TO ADULT PROBATON/CTORD  DEFENDANT TO GO MEET WITH ADULT PROBATION/CTORD  DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE A 52 WEEK ANGER MANAGEMENT AND SUBSTANCE ABUSE COUNSLG AS DETERMID BY APD/X IF COURT RECEIVES A POSITIVE REPORT ON 11-09-12 AND ANOTHER POITIVE REPORT 3 MONTHS AFTER AND COMPLETES 6 MONTHS IN THE PROGRAM THE COUELING WILL BE DEEMED COMPLETED AND ADULT PROBATION WILL BE CONVERTED BACKO COURT PROBATION/SA1 SUBRINA WALLACE/SAORD/X NOTICE OF TERMINATION OF PROTECTIVE ORDER ISSUED ON 05-29-12 IS FILED WITH THE COURT/PROB EXT  05-2815/PROG 11-09-12/DOP/
